_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organization and/or partner collection systems, capabilities, and processes (e.g., collection and protocol processors).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.606), AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.580).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.631). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, systems]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, collection, organization, partner, processes, processors] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.873, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.8%). "Knowledge of organization and/or partner collection systems, capabilities, and p" and "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.657 ≈ STS 0.631 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, systems]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, collection, organization, partner, processes, processors]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational].
